name: 07-ipvs-modules
args:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${target_username:+${target_username}@}${target_host} 'cat >> /etc/modules-load.d/ipvs.conf << EOF
ip_vs
ip_vs_rr
ip_vs_wrr
ip_vs_sh
nf_conntrack
ip_tables
ip_set
xt_set
ipt_set
ipt_rpfilter
ipt_REJECT
ipip
EOF
systemctl restart systemd-modules-load.service 2>/dev/null || true; modprobe ip_vs ip_vs_rr ip_vs_wrr ip_vs_sh nf_conntrack 2>/dev/null || true'
